turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 87-1862, California versus Arc America Corporation will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: This case is here on appeal from the Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit. We reverse the judgment of that court. The opinion and sum filed with the Clerk explains why. The opinion is unanimous except the Justices Stevens and O’Connor who took no part in the case.
